summary: A 2019 DHS/MLB '#WhyISeeSay / Protect Your Every Day' Opening Day PSA: a woman outside a ballpark and fans tailgating speak to camera about protecting their team and community ('it's more than just a game'), closing with a See/Say card. It is a narrated testimonial awareness spot, not a music-driven spectacle or genre experiment, and predates the second Trump administration. Out of scope.
notable_text: WHY DO YOU / We all have something worth protecting, a why that unifies us. / Report suspicious activity to local authorities. If you see something, say something.
